CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2016 Continued To Nov-16-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Strike Re: Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christopher T. Lustig of Craddick Candland & Conti (925-838-1100) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party, Kaiser Foundation Health Plan, Inc.

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC.'S Motion To Strike Re: Complaint is GRANTED as a result of the accompanying ruling on defendant's demurrer. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, bus. tel: (530) 339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christopher T. Lustig of Craddick Candland & Conti (925-838-1100) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party, Kaiser Foundation Health Plan, Inc.

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC.'S A CORPORATION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff's complaint asserts liability for acts committed by health care providers. However, the demurring (and only named) defendant - Kaiser Foundation Health Plan, Inc. - is statutorily immune "from liability for acts committed by health care providers." (Kaiser Foundation Health Care Plan, Inc. v. Sup. Ct. (2012) 203 Cal.App.4th 696, 714.) Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, bus. tel: (530) 339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Richard Fee (415-586-6037) appears as plaintiff/opposing party In Propria Persona

Attorney, Christopher T. Lustig of Craddick Candland & Conti (925-838-1100) appears as counsel for defendant/demurring party

Court hears from both sides. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is ordered off calendar due to failure to comply with Code of Civil Procedure 430.41. Court state findings as set forth on the record.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023. (D302)

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023. (D302)
